evals.prompt: We have a new developer joining. Create an onboarding guide for this project.
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive onboarding guide: project overview, setup, code structure, workflow, common tasks, resources. Checklist and suggested first issues.

evals.prompt: /onboard frontend - new dev is joining the frontend team, focus the guide on that
evals.expected_output: Frontend-focused onboarding guide. Setup for frontend dev, relevant structure, frontend workflow, frontend-specific tasks and resources.
